introSection: Muntanya Russa is a steel terrain roller coaster located at Tibidabo in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain. It was manufactured by Vekoma and constructed onsite by RCS GmbH.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is built on a hillside and has red track with grey supports.

fullText:
Muntanya Russa is a steel terrain roller coaster located at Tibidabo in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain. It was manufactured by Vekoma and constructed onsite by RCS GmbH.

The ride is built on a hillside and has red track with grey supports.
